_comment_hash: SHA256 digest below is from the v2.0.6 GitHub Release (published 2026-04-22). Do not invent digests.
_comment_bin: Binary is az-ai.exe. Prior releases (≤2.0.6) shipped as az-ai-v2.exe; the v1/v2 dual-binary transition is complete.
_comment_notice: Scoop has no doc directory concept, so the release tarball must place NOTICE + THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md + LICENSE at the extraction root next to az-ai.exe. post_install surfaces their paths to the user so Lippman's 'all distributed artifacts include NOTICE' claim holds for Windows installs.
_comment_pin: Versioned-pin support: sibling versions/ directory holds az-ai@<version>.json manifests so users can `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai@2.0.6`. Follows scoopinstaller/versions bucket conventions.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
